violations.text: (Various food product ) was observed held at (46-62 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Hot Water is lacking at all handwashing sinks New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the front counter area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Handwashing sink is in front counter area is lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Knives were observed being stored between the wall and 3 bay sink. PIC removed placed in 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (slicer) have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Hot Water is lacking at all handsinks. PIC informed and be available for prior to reinspection New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The (floor ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed missing and/or damaged tile. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
The (wall ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed holes in wall surrounding the piping. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
